2605.07721.title: Memory-Efficient Looped Transformer: Decoupling Compute from Memory in Looped Language Models
2605.07721.paper_summary: Recurrent LLM architectures have emerged as a promising approach for improving reasoning, as they enable multi-step computation in the embedding space without generating intermediate tokens. Models such as Ouro perform reasoning by iteratively updating internal representations while retaining a standard Key-Value (KV) cache across iterations, causing memory consumption to grow linearly with reasoning depth. Consequently, increasing the number of reasoning iterations can lead to prohibitive memory usage, limiting the practical scalability of such architectures. In this work, we propose Memory-Efficient Looped Transformer (MELT), a novel architecture that decouples reasoning depth from memory consumption. Instead of using a standard KV cache per layer and loop, MELT maintains a single KV cache per layer that is shared across reasoning loops. This cache is updated over time via a learnable gating mechanism. To enable stable and efficient training under this architecture, we propose to train MELT using chunk-wise training in a two phase procedure: interpolated transition, followed by attention-aligned distillation, both from the LoopLM starting model to MELT. Empirically, we show that MELT models fine-tuned from pretrained Ouro parameters outperform standard LLMs of comparable size, while maintaining a memory footprint comparable to those models and dramatically smaller than Ouro's. Overall, MELT achieves constant-memory iterative reasoning without sacrificing LoopLM performance, using only a lightweight post-training procedure.
2605.07721.paper_summary_zh: 重複的 LLM 架構已經成為改善推理的一種有前景的方法，因為它們能夠在嵌入空間中進行多步計算，而不生成中間標記。像 Ouro 這樣的模型通過在保留標準鍵值 (KV) 緩存的情況下，迭代更新內部表示來進行推理，這導致記憶消耗隨著推理深度的增加而線性增長。因此，增加推理迭代的次數可能會導致過高的記憶使用，限制了這類架構的實際可擴展性。在這項工作中，我們提出了記憶高效循環Transformer (MELT)，這是一種新穎的架構，將推理深度與記憶消耗解耦。MELT 不使用每層和每個循環的標準 KV 緩存，而是維護每層的單一 KV 緩存，並在推理循環中共享。這個緩存通過可學習的閘控機制隨時間更新。為了在這種架構下實現穩定和高效的訓練，我們建議使用分塊訓練的兩階段程序來訓練 MELT：插值過渡，然後是注意力對齊的蒸餾，這兩者都是從 LoopLM 起始模型到 MELT。實證結果顯示，從預訓練的 Ouro 參數微調的 MELT 模型在性能上超越了可比大小的標準 LLM，同時保持了與這些模型相當的記憶佔用，並且顯著小於 Ouro 的記憶佔用。總體而言，MELT 實現了恆定記憶的迭代推理，而不犧牲 LoopLM 的性能，僅使用輕量級的後訓練程序。
2605.07721.author: Victor Conchello Vendrell et.al.
2605.07721.authors: Victor Conchello Vendrell, Arnau Padres Masdemont, Niccolò Grillo, Jordi Ros-Giralt, Arash Behboodi, Fabio Valerio Massoli
